message:
style(models): rustfmt models-status formatting

Mechanical reformat of the multi-model `run_models_status` rewrite:

- Wrap the long `snowflake | snowflake-arctic-s | snowflake-arctic-
  embed-s | snowflake-arctic-s-384` match arm across multiple lines.
- Flatten the nested `if let (Some(active), Some(obj)) = ... { if let
  Some(active_obj) = ... { ... } }` into a single `if let &&`-chain.
- Move `s.manifest.revision.get(..12).unwrap_or(...)` onto its own
  line per rustfmt's chain-breaking width rules.
- Re-indent a long `active_status = ...and_then(|name| ...)` to
  rustfmt's preferred shape.

No behavior change. Quiets `cargo fmt --check` so CI's format gate
stays green.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
